theme_notes: SpaceX executes the largest IPO in history, making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire; 2026 FIFA World Cup continues with the USA thrashing Paraguay 4-1; US-Iran exchange fire while peace talks inch forward and the Strait of Hormuz closure looms; Trump celebrates his 80th birthday with a UFC event at the White House.
settled: Musk hit a trillion. You two hit zero. One of these is news.
World Cup kickoff. Balance also at zero. Neither will last 90 minutes.
Iran exchanged fire AND opened peace talks today. You two just need to Venmo.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup beer. The shame isn't less.
Musk made this while deciding what to name a rocket. You haven't paid.
Small enough to ignore. Exactly what you've been doing.
That's one World Cup watch-party round. Which you also didn't buy.
SpaceX IPO'd at two trillion. Your contribution to this household trends differently.
Trump turned 80 today. This debt is younger than him. Barely an excuse.
USA beat Paraguay 4-1. Your partner is beating you by a wider margin.
The Strait of Hormuz got blockaded. So did your Venmo notifications.
Musk became a trillionaire on the same day you forgot to pay this. Noted.
Musk added this to his net worth between breakfast and his second tweet. You are not Musk.
Iran and the US exchanged fire and STILL opened talks. You haven't opened the app.
That's a scalped World Cup knockout ticket. You owe the price AND the audacity.
Trump threw an 80th birthday bash with UFC and fireworks. You owe this. No party.
SpaceX went public at $2 trillion. Your finances went underground.
Iran's peace deal is moving faster than your repayment. And it involves missiles.
Musk became the world's first trillionaire today. You became the world's most indebted partner.
The Strait of Hormuz shut down global shipping. Your partner shut down emotionally. Correlation.
At this point it's not a debt. It's a bilateral incident.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup souvenir scarf. Demand full ceremony.
A rounding error on Musk's new hourly take-home. Still yours.
Smaller than a Trump birthday candle budget. Collect with matching gravitas.
They owe you a World Cup watch-party round. They know. They remember.
SpaceX IPO'd and made Musk a trillionaire. You are owed a transfer. Lesser, but valid.
The Strait of Hormuz is closed. So is their banking app, apparently.
USA won 4-1 today. You're winning the balance. Enjoy the scoreboard.
SpaceX just went public. Their Venmo remains in holding pattern.
World Cup round-of-16 ticket territory. They owe you the experience.
Musk made this before finishing his espresso this morning. Your partner: still steeping.
Iran and the US are in talks. You two have nothing to discuss until this is settled.
Trump turned 80 with a UFC event. You deserve at minimum a payment notification.
SpaceX raised $75 billion in a day. They haven't moved this in a month.
The Strait of Hormuz opened back up. Their wallet did not receive the memo.
Musk crossed a trillion. You're crossing into legal options.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. They closed their banking app. Same energy, worse consequences.
You are not their partner. You are a creditor nation with leverage and receipts.
